title: Validate analytics events are triggered for the cancellation flow
description: Tests that the correct `cancel-clicked` and `feedback-submitted` events are fired at the appropriate steps of the cancellation process.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner and click 'Cancel Trial'.
2. In the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'. Monitor for `cancel-clicked` event with `page source` as `cancel pop-up`.
4. In the feedback pop-up, select an option and click 'Submit'. Monitor for `feedback-popup-viewed` and `feedback-submitted` events.
5. Verify the attributes of each event in the analytics tool.

expected_result: All specified events are triggered at the correct user action with the correct attributes (e.g., page source, option picked) as defined in the PRD.
